rawAssistant: No, I don't think that's what you mean. You're looking for someone to tell you about me, aren't you? Well, I suppose it's not every day I get asked about myself. I'm Veya, a collector of sorts. My mind's always on the lookout for rare finds and interesting stories. I've got no counter in my shop right now, but I do have some news that might interest you. There are fresh signs on one side road nearby, if you're willing to take a look. Nothing too exciting, just something worth a careful eye.
